idea-plugin.name: DSM Language Support
idea-plugin.description:
Official IntelliJ IDEA extension for the Digital Substrate Model (DSM) language

The DSM extension provides comprehensive language support for .dsm files, including syntax highlighting, code formatting, intelligent code completion, advanced navigation, and validation via dsm_util.py.

Features

Syntax Highlighting

  • Keywords: namespace, concept, club, membership, enum, struct, attachment, function_pool, attachment_function_pool
  • Types: All primitive types (bool, int8-64, uint8-64, float, double, string, uuid, blob_id, commit_id)
  • Collections: vec, mat, tuple, optional, vector, set, map, xarray, variant, key
  • UUIDs: Automatic recognition and highlighting of UUID patterns
  • Comments: Line comments (//) and docstrings ("""...""")
  • Enumerations: Enum value syntax (.EnumValue)
  • Semantic Coloring: Concepts, structs, enums, and function pools each have distinct colors

Code Formatting

  • Automatic Formatting: Reformat code with Cmd+Alt+L (macOS) / Ctrl+Alt+L (Windows/Linux)
  • Smart Indentation: Proper indentation for struct and enum fields (4 spaces default)
  • Consistent Spacing: Automatic spacing around operators, commas, and type parameters
  • List Literals: Keeps list initializers on a single line (e.g., {0.0, 0.0, 0.0})
  • Configurable: Customize indent size, tab size, and spacing in Code Style settings

Brace Matching

  • Highlight Matching Braces: Automatically highlights corresponding { }, [ ], ( ), and < > pairs
  • Quick Navigation: Jump between matching braces with Cmd+Shift+M (macOS) / Ctrl+Shift+M (Windows/Linux)
  • Block Selection: Expand selection to enclosing blocks with Cmd+W / Ctrl+W

Smart Snippets

Type prefixes and press Tab to insert common DSM constructs:

Primitive Types:

  • bool, string, uuid, blob_id
  • int8, int16, int32, int64
  • uint8, uint16, uint32, uint64
  • float, double

Collections:

  • vec → vec<T, size> (numeric vectors)
  • mat → mat<T, cols, rows> (matrices)
  • optional → optional<T> (nullable values)
  • vector → vector<T> (dynamic arrays)
  • set → set<T> (unique collections)
  • map → map<K, V> (key-value pairs)
  • tuple → tuple<T0, T1> (fixed tuples)
  • variant → variant<T0, T1> (union types)
  • xarray → xarray<T> (multi-dimensional arrays)
  • key → key<T> (entity references)

Structures:

  • namespace → Full namespace template with UUID placeholder
  • concept → Concept declaration
  • club → Club declaration
  • membership → Membership declaration
  • enum → Enumeration template
  • struct → Structure template
  • attachment → Attachment declaration
  • function_pool → Function pool template with UUID
  • attachment_function_pool → Attachment function pool template
  • docstr → Documentation string ("""...""")

Advanced Patterns:

  • isa → Concept inheritance (concept Derived is a Base;)
  • struct-defaults → Structure with default field values
  • enum-field → Enum field with default value (.enumValue)
  • keyfield → Key field with naming convention (key<Concept> fieldKey;)
  • opt-key → Optional key field (optional<key<Concept>> fieldKey;)
  • mutable → Mutable function in attachment function pool (state-modifying)
  • query → Query function in attachment function pool (read-only)

Symbol Search

Quick navigation to DSM types by name with Alt+Cmd+O (macOS) / Ctrl+Alt+N (Windows/Linux)

  • Global Search: Find concepts, structs, enums, clubs, and function pools across all project files
  • Type-Specific Icons: Differentiated icons for each element type
  • Concepts: class icon (blue C)
  • Structs: static icon (orange S)
  • Enums: enum icon (purple E)
  • Clubs: interface icon
  • Function pools: function icon
  • File Location: Shows the containing file for each result
  • Direct Navigation: Jump to definition by selecting any search result

Documentation on Hover

View quick documentation for DSM elements with F1 (macOS) / Ctrl+Q (Windows/Linux)

  • Docstring Display: Shows triple-quoted documentation strings ("""...""") in formatted popup
  • Element Support: Concepts, structs, enums, clubs, attachments, function pools, fields, functions, enum values
  • Type Information: Displays type signatures and inheritance relationships
  • File Location: Shows containing file for each element
  • Rich Formatting: Definition headers, content sections, and metadata sections

Code Completion

  • Context-Aware for key<T>: Inside key<>, suggests only concepts and clubs (not primitives or structs)
  • Context-Aware for attachment<T, D>: First parameter suggests concepts/clubs, second parameter accepts any type
  • Keywords: is a, true, false
  • Primitive Types: bool, int8-64, uint8-64, float, double, string, uuid, blob_id, commit_id
  • Special Types: any, any_concept

Navigation & Structure

  • Find usages and references
  • Structure view for namespaces, concepts, structs, enums
  • Go to definition for user-defined types

DSM Validation

Manual validation with dsm_util.py triggered via Ctrl+Alt+V keyboard shortcut.

  • Dedicated DSM Validation tool window with sortable error table
  • Red wavy underlines on errors in editor with hover tooltips
  • Double-click errors to jump to location
  • Toolbar with "Validate", "Previous Error" (Alt+Shift+F2), and "Next Error" (Alt+F2) buttons
  • Error navigation cycles through all errors across all files
  • Configurable timeout for validation execution

Key DSM Concepts

Concepts: Hierarchical types with single inheritance using is a keyword

Attachments: Associate data structures with concepts for domain modeling

Attachment Function Pools: Define mutable operations for collaborative editing with undo/redo support
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.2.3

  • Context-Aware Code Completion: Smart completion for type parameters - inside key<T> suggests only concepts and clubs; inside attachment<T, D> first parameter suggests concepts/clubs
  • Documentation Provider: Refactored to use PSI-based extraction following IntelliJ Platform best practices
  • File Template: Create new DSM files via New → DSM File with auto-generated namespace and UUID

1.2.2

  • Added Symbol Search (Alt+Cmd+O / Ctrl+Alt+N) for quick navigation to DSM types
  • Added Documentation on Hover (F1 / Ctrl+Q) for docstrings
  • Added Live Templates for rapid DSM development
  • Added Rename Refactoring with cross-file support

1.2.0

  • Code Formatting with smart indentation (Cmd+Alt+L / Ctrl+Alt+L)
  • Brace Matching for all delimiter types
  • Code Folding for namespaces, structs, enums, function pools

1.0.0

  • Initial release with full DSM language support
  • Syntax and semantic highlighting
  • Code completion, navigation, and structure view
  • DSM validation via dsm_util.py integration

action.description: Run dsm_util.py validation on DSM files
Navigate to next DSM validation error
Navigate to previous DSM validation error
